headline: Crypto Exchange Turned All Investor Assets Into Dogecoin Without Telling Them, Alleges New York

headline: What's Going On With EOS Cryptocurrency?

The token of EOS (EOS), a decentralized applications, or DApp, centered platform aimed at developers, traded nearly 50% higher on Tuesday night.
